# Summary

Describe the repository maintenance change.

---

## Related Issue

Closes: #

---

## Changes

Examples:

- CI workflow updates
- dependency upgrades
- repository configuration improvements

---

## Risk Level

- [ ] Low – administrative change
- [ ] Medium – CI or automation change
- [ ] High – affects development workflow

---

## Validation

Explain how the change was validated.

Examples:

- workflow executed successfully
- linting passed
- configuration verified

---

## Rollback Plan

How this change can be reverted if necessary.

Example:

- revert PR
- restore previous workflow

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Change aligns with repository governance
- [ ] CI workflows validated
- [ ] No breaking changes introduced
- [ ] Related issue linked
